rdf:Description.dcterms:bibliographicCitation: The collection of Raoul Tolentino : paintings, with fine primitive and Renaissance examples ..., bronzes from the Roman excavations, terracotta and stucco groups and bas-reliefs, Gothic and Renaissance furniture, catalogo della vendita all'asta American Art Association, (New York, 8-11 dicembre)., New York, 1926.
rdf:Description.dcterms:title: The collection of Raoul Tolentino : paintings, with fine primitive and Renaissance examples ..., bronzes from the Roman excavations, terracotta and stucco groups and bas-reliefs, Gothic and Renaissance furniture, catalogo della vendita all'asta American Art Association, (New York, 8-11 dicembre).
